tasks.title: Cart State Management
tasks.description: Create React context + reducer for cart state. Support add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations.

tasks.title: Cart UI Components
tasks.description: Build CartDrawer, CartItem, and CartSummary components with responsive design.

tasks.title: Stripe Checkout Integration
tasks.description: Server-side Stripe checkout session creation and client-side redirect. Handle success and cancel callbacks.

tasks.title: Cart Persistence
tasks.description: Persist cart to localStorage with hydration on page load. Sync with server for authenticated users.

testStrategy.unit: Vitest tests for reducer, context, and storage utils
testStrategy.e2e: Playwright tests for add-to-cart, checkout flow, and persistence
